title: Extra line
description: Add one more main-program line so your strategy fits more comfortably.

title: Portal overcharge
description: Make active portals split into 3 child balls instead of 2.

title: Queue peek
description: Preview the next 3 ball types instead of only the next 1.

title: Lucky bonus
description: Give lucky balls an extra visible score bonus when they land in a bucket.

title: Helper buffer
description: Give the helper editor two extra lines for a longer reusable tactic.
